response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video content chronologically. 2. Identified introductory talk segment, a main musical performance of 'Baka Mitai', followed by transitions, a talk show segment, a merchandise showcase, and a closing outro. 3. Confirmed 'Baka Mitai' (ばかみたい) as the only vocal song. 4. Used search tool with 'ばかみたい 歌詞' and 'Baka Mitai lyrics English translation' to retrieve official lyrics and translation. 5. Mapped scenes based on content transitions. 6. Structured data into the required JSON format.
response.global_summary: The video begins with an intro segment featuring two VTubers, Cecilia and Gigi, followed by a vocal performance of the song "Baka Mitai". This is followed by a series of segments including a talk show, an intermission/bridge, a merchandise showcase, a transition, and a final outro. No other vocal songs were detected.

scenes.description: Intro segment with VTubers Cecilia and Gigi.
VTubers Cecilia and Gigi perform 'Baka Mitai'. 'ばかみたい' appears on-screen.
